name: find-plus-plus
description: Find++ Chrome extension: multi-keyword in-page search with color-coded highlights.

scripts.check: node --check src/background/service-worker.js && node --check src/content/findbar.js && node --check src/shared/search-core.js
scripts.package: mkdir -p release && zip -r release/find-plus-plus.zip manifest.json README.md assets src -x '*.DS_Store'
